arts.ttl: UEFA Champions League Predictions: Arsenal vs. PSG, Barcelona vs. Inter Milan
arts.sum: UEFA Champions League score predictions for the first semifinal legs in Arsenal vs. PSG and Barcelona vs. Inter Milna.

arts.ttl: Arsenal training video released as Mikel Arteta receives double injury boost for PSG Champions League clash
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta receives a double fitness boost ahead of Tuesday's Champions League semi-final first leg with Paris Saint-Germain, as two players return to training.

arts.ttl: Up front or in midfield, Merino could hold key for Arsenal against PSG
arts.sum: Few would have believed it earlier this season, when there were questions around the wisdom of signing him, but Mikel Merino faces Paris Saint-Germain this week as one of the most important players to Arsenal's hopes of reaching the Champions League final.

arts.ttl: Mikel Merino sent Kai Havertz competition warning as Arsenal striker prediction made before PSG
arts.sum: Mikel Merino's Arsenal resurgence can be likened to Kai Havertz's improvement in North London, but the pair should prepare to battle for minutes next season.

arts.ttl: Ligue 1 Review | Troubling signs for PSG ahead of Arsenal semi-final
arts.sum: On Friday night, Paris Saint-Germain were just four games away from invincibility. Until that point, they had navigated 30 Ligue 1 fixtures without tasting a single defeat. It would have…

arts.ttl: Arsenal warned over PSG's 'new George Best' bidding to end their Champions League dream
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE: Arsenal lock horns with PSG in the Champions League semi-finals on Tuesday night and winger winger Khvicha Kvaratskhelia has been earmarked as a serious threat for the French side ahead of the first leg

arts.ttl: How Ousmane Dembélé’s squad exclusion against Arsenal spurred on an exceptional 2025
arts.sum: Ousmane Dembélé was the centre of intrigue when Paris Saint-Germain were defeated by Arsenal earlier this season in the UEFA Champions League. Much attention was directed at Luis Enrique’s decision…

arts.ttl: Five things that have changed since Arsenal beat PSG as Mikel Arteta faces new challenge
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta and Arsenal made light work of seeing off PSG when they clashed in the Champions League group phase, but the French champions have excelled since that defeat

arts.ttl: ‘I think’: David Raya says he’s spotted a ‘big difference’ about PSG from when Arsenal beat them 2-0

arts.ttl: Merson Says: Arsenal can beat PSG and have 'massive chance' to win CL
arts.sum: Sky Sports' Paul Merson says Arsenal can beat Paris Saint-Germain over two legs in the Champions League semi-final, and have a "massive opportunity" to win the tournament.
